comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Sahara episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE SAHARA COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/4erCBTf

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN THE SAHARA*
  ◦ Desert tours, camel treks, and overnight dune camps → https://shorturl.at/rerzQ
  ◦ Browse all Sahara and Morocco experiences → https://shorturl.at/YdJge

*📖 PLAN YOUR SAHARA TRIP*
  ◦ Lonely Planet Morocco, current edition, covering the dunes, oases, and desert routes → https://amzn.to/4vZCLZv
  ◦ Lonely Planet Moroccan Arabic Phrasebook and Dictionary → https://amzn.to/4egVA4o

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO THE SAHARA*
  ◦ Sahara: A Natural History by Marq de Villiers, the green Sahara, the aquifers, and the nomads in one volume → https://amzn.to/4egcLTE
  ◦ The Sheltering Sky by Paul Bowles, the classic novel of the desert → https://amzn.to/4ermPHZ

*🍲 BRING THE SAHARA HOME*
  ◦ The Food of Morocco by Paula Wolfert, the definitive guide to North African cooking → https://amzn.to/4vaKQKB
  ◦ Sahara by Michael Palin, the bestselling desert crossing with 175 photographs → https://amzn.to/4vjIZn0

🌍 Every Where on Earth journey, all in one place → https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNAt9bkbci0wjQ1DY7mwpUUbHqc-I7Yro

🔔 Subscribe → https://www.youtube.com/@WhereOnEarth?sub_confirmation=1

comments.author: @JY-dg6dz
comments.text:
It will be green again with hard and persistent work.
Nothing Is impossible.

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: The Sahara has done it before. Thank you for watching. 🌿

comments.author: @RayOyler-lo6xc
comments.text: It will be green again,in about 100 years.

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: The green Sahara is one of the quietest chapters in the whole climate story. Thank you for watching. 🌿
